description: Phase 21 scan_audit_retention: reports/n6_meta_audit.jsonl must stay within N6_AUDIT_MAX (default 1000) entries. The scanner rotates excess to reports/history/audit_archive_YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl (keep_after_rotation=500). Claim verifies entries_in_main_after <= max_entries, preventing unbounded growth.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_audit_retention.json ] && jq -r "if .within_bound == true then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_audit_retention.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
